3130370.name: Trainz Plus DLC - Model Trainz: Germany
3130370.description:
EN:
Welcome to Germany! 

Model Trainz: Germany is a German themed model railway route with several inspirations from different parts of Germany and a few from the classical routes from UTC. The route takes place in the valley of the mountains and in the mountains. 

Route features:
-    x21 rooms with each room featuring a different location in Germany
-    x2 staging yards for starting / ending an operation with x1hidden staging yard
-    x11 industries that require supplied to be delivered on time
-    x9 passenger stations to keep the passengers on the move
-    AI runaround tracks to keep the AI trains moving

If you are into German railways in a model train package, then this is for you!

This route was created in partnership with 3DZUG who kind was very enough to add / gave permission for the following:
- HV signal system with ZS3 & ZS3v (by 3DZUG)
- KS signal system with ZS3 & ZS3v (by 3DZUG)
- Catenary work (by 3DZUG) (mobile version)
Thank you for permission to use the content listed above!

Developed by Hiawathamr Trainz Add-ons
3130370.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 捷克语, 荷兰语, 波兰语, 俄语
